5.0.short_description: Activate the creation of wall result states in memory or as files

keywords.name: wall.result.activate
keywords.description: Activate the creation of wall result states in memory or as files

keywords.name: wall.result.addattribute
keywords.description: Add the wall attribute <a class="reference internal" href="

keywords.name: wall.result.clear
keywords.description: Clear the current wall result states stored in memory and the table referring to wall results

keywords.name: wall.result.cycles
keywords.description: Specify the number of cycles between wall result tabulation or, if given with the load / export keywords, specify the exact cycle number of the wall result state to re-create/output

keywords.name: wall.result.deactivate
keywords.description: Deactivate the creation of additional wall result states or files

keywords.name: wall.result.export
keywords.description: Output a wall result held in memory to file with a name specified via the filename keyword

keywords.name: wall.result.filename
keywords.description: Prefix to the name of the binary file into which the wall result will be output if not given with the load or export keywords

keywords.name: wall.result.generate
keywords.description: Generate a wall result corresponding to the current model state

keywords.name: wall.result.map
keywords.description: Place the list of cycle numbers and times associated with result tabulation into the FISH map <a class="reference internal" href="

keywords.name: wall.result.nothrow
keywords.description: Set the state affecting 1) the deletion of walls prior to wall model-state re-creation and 2) name conflicts that may arise when outputting wall results to file

keywords.name: wall.result.removeattribute
keywords.description: Remove the wall attribute <a class="reference internal" href="

keywords.name: wall.result.time
keywords.description: Specify the mechanical time interval between wall result tabulation or, if given with the load / export keywords, specify the mechanical age of the wall result state to re-create/output

keywords.name: wall.result.zero
keywords.description: The wall result times will begin with 0 versus the current mechanical age of the system
